title: Government response to the Climate Change Committee 2025 adaptation progress report
body: "This document sets out the government’s response to the Climate Change Committee’s (CCC’s) 2025 progress report in adapting to climate change and its recommendations on adaptation.  The government’s response sets out:   detailed responses to each of the CCC’s 59 recommendations, including the priority recommendations identified by the CCC  areas where progress has been made to adapt to climate risks over the last 2 years   This response should be read alongside the government response to the CCC 2025 progress report in reducing emissions. "
